title: bistorta major var. ovata
intro: Bistorta major var. ovata, also known as bistort or snakewort, is a perennial plant species within the Polygonaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Bistorta major var. ovata can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, offering a natural approach to addressing various health concerns.
